allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "D:\\HW\\AscendCANN\\cann-dashboard" | Where-Object {$_.Extension -eq '.html'} | Select-Object Name, LastWriteTime, Length)

PowerShell($bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("D:\\HW\\AscendCANN\\cann-dashboard\\analysis.html"\); "File size: $\($bytes.Length\) bytes"; "First 4 bytes \(BOM check\): $\($bytes[0..3] | ForEach-Object { $_.ToString\('X2'\) } | Join-String -Separator ' '\)")

Bash(grep -o "\\-\\-o-color-info1:[^;]*;\\|--font_family:[^;]*;\\|--o-color-main1:[^;]*;\\|--o-color-brand[^;]*;\\|background:#[0-9a-fA-F]\\{3,6\\}" "D:\\HW\\AscendCANN\\cann-dashboard\\ascend-doc\\性能调优-CANN社区版9.1.0-beta.1-昇腾社区.html")
Bash(grep -o "color:#[0-9a-fA-F]\\{3,6\\}" "D:\\HW\\AscendCANN\\cann-dashboard\\ascend-doc\\性能调优-CANN社区版9.1.0-beta.1-昇腾社区.html")
Bash(grep -o "background-color:#[0-9a-fA-F]\\{3,6\\}\\|background:#[0-9a-fA-F]\\{3,6\\}" "D:\\HW\\AscendCANN\\cann-dashboard\\ascend-doc\\性能调优-CANN社区版9.1.0-beta.1-昇腾社区.html")
Bash(grep -oP "\(?<=nav-bar|header|sidebar|\\.VPNav\)[^<]{1,200}" "D:\\HW\\AscendCANN\\cann-dashboard\\ascend-doc\\性能调优-CANN社区版9.1.0-beta.1-昇腾社区.html")
Bash(grep -oP "ly-app-header[^<>]{0,300}" "D:\\HW\\AscendCANN\\cann-dashboard\\ascend-doc\\性能调优-CANN社区版9.1.0-beta.1-昇腾社区.html")

PowerShell(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5200" -UseBasicParsing 2>&1 | Select-Object StatusCode, StatusDescription; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5200/guide/入门教程/Ascend-C概述与学习路径" -UseBasicParsing 2>&1 | Select-Object StatusCode)

PowerShell(Start-Sleep 3; Start-Process -FilePath "cmd.exe" -ArgumentList "/c cd /d D:\\HW\\AscendCANN\\cann-dashboard\\ascend-doc\\vitepress && node node_modules\\vitepress\\bin\\vitepress.js dev --port 5500 > dev.log 2>&1" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep 20; Get-Content "D:\\HW\\AscendCANN\\cann-dashboard\\ascend-doc\\vitepress\\dev.log")
